text:
- update to 1.5.0
-> phantomjs now shipped with bundled qt & webkit, so build takes roughly 30 min.
- added LICENSE in Makefile
- shared Qt libs are installed in lib/phantomjs
- removed files/patch-src-mongoose-mongoose.c
- added files/patch-mongoose-pri
- added pkg-plist
